products.name: Basics To Advanced In React
products.overview: A complete React course covering fundamentals to advanced concepts like hooks, state management, routing, and real-world project building.
products.long_description: This course takes you from React basics to advanced development patterns. You will start with components, JSX, props, and state, then move into hooks like useEffect, useMemo, and useCallback. The course also covers routing, API integration, state management techniques, and performance optimization. By the end, you will build real-world projects that simulate production-level applications and understand how to structure scalable React codebases.

products.name: Django Framework for Beginners
products.overview: Learn Django from scratch and build secure, scalable web applications using Python and MVC architecture.
products.long_description: This beginner-friendly course introduces Django from the ground up. You will learn how to set up projects, create apps, manage databases with ORM, and build dynamic web pages. The course covers authentication, admin panel customization, form handling, and deployment basics. By the end, you will be able to build fully functional backend systems using Django.

products.name: The Future of Design Systems
products.overview: Understand modern design systems and how they improve scalability, consistency, and UI development workflows.
products.long_description: This course explores the principles and future of design systems in modern UI/UX development. You will learn component-driven design, design tokens, reusable UI patterns, and collaboration between designers and developers. It also covers popular design system tools and real-world case studies from large-scale applications.

products.name: The Complete Guide to Backend Development
products.overview: Master backend development including APIs, databases, authentication, and server-side architecture.
products.long_description: This comprehensive backend course teaches how to build robust server-side applications. Topics include REST APIs, database design, authentication systems, caching, and server architecture. You will also learn how to structure scalable backend systems and connect them with frontend applications using real-world projects.

products.name: Build a Blockchain from Scratch in Go
products.overview: Learn blockchain fundamentals by building a complete blockchain system using the Go programming language.
products.long_description: This course teaches blockchain concepts through hands-on implementation in Go. You will build blocks, implement hashing algorithms, create proof-of-work systems, and design a decentralized ledger. The course also explains consensus mechanisms and how blockchain networks maintain security and integrity.

products.name: Frontend Fastlane Plan With Projects
products.overview: A project-driven roadmap to master frontend development quickly using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and frameworks.
products.long_description: This course is designed as a fast-track plan to become a frontend developer. It covers HTML, CSS, JavaScript fundamentals, responsive design, and modern frameworks. You will build multiple real-world projects to strengthen your skills and prepare for job-ready frontend development.

products.name: Master the Code Review
products.overview: Learn how to write better code through effective code review practices and collaborative development.
products.long_description: This course teaches the art of code review in professional software development. You will learn how to analyze code quality, identify bugs, suggest improvements, and follow best practices. It also covers collaboration workflows using Git and GitHub in team environments.

products.name: JavaScript Basics To Advance
products.overview: Master JavaScript from fundamentals to advanced concepts including ES6+, async programming, and DOM manipulation.
products.long_description: This course provides a complete JavaScript learning path starting from basic syntax to advanced topics. You will learn variables, functions, objects, DOM manipulation, asynchronous programming, promises, and ES6+ features. Real-world projects help solidify your understanding.

products.name: Python Deep Dive With Projects
products.overview: Deep dive into Python programming with practical projects and real-world problem solving.
products.long_description: This course covers Python programming in depth, including data structures, object-oriented programming, file handling, and libraries. You will build multiple projects that strengthen problem-solving skills and prepare you for real-world Python development.

products.name: Mastering Software Technique
products.overview: Improve your software engineering skills by learning clean code, design principles, and best practices.
products.long_description: This course focuses on core software engineering principles such as clean code, SOLID principles, debugging strategies, and system design basics. You will learn how to write maintainable and scalable software used in professional environments.

products.name: Web Development Foundation
products.overview: A solid foundation course covering HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and basic web development concepts.
products.long_description: This course introduces the fundamentals of web development. You will learn how websites work, build static and dynamic pages using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, and understand how frontend and backend systems interact.

products.name: Mastering Git and GitHub - A Practical Guide
products.overview: Learn version control using Git and collaboration workflows using GitHub.
products.long_description: This course teaches Git from basics to advanced workflows. You will learn version control concepts, branching, merging, pull requests, and collaboration techniques using GitHub. It is essential for every developer working in teams.

products.name: Everything About React v16
products.overview: Explore React v16 features including lifecycle methods, hooks introduction, and component architecture.
products.long_description: This course focuses on React v16 and its ecosystem. You will learn class components, lifecycle methods, hooks introduction, state management, and building structured applications using React best practices.

products.name: Diving Deep With Python 2.7
products.overview: Learn Python programming fundamentals and advanced concepts with a focus on Python 2.7 syntax and features.
products.long_description: This course covers Python 2.7 in depth, including syntax, functions, object-oriented programming, and standard libraries. It also highlights differences between Python 2 and Python 3 for better understanding of legacy systems.

products.name: Kickstart Your UI Design Career
products.overview: Start your UI/UX design journey by learning design principles, tools, and practical project workflows.
products.long_description: This course introduces UI/UX design fundamentals including color theory, typography, layout design, and user experience principles. You will also work with modern design tools and build portfolio-ready projects.
